rationale: Medical professionals need a calm, highly readable, and straightforward interface. We use solid surfaces to prevent visual clutter, a trusting blue primary color, and high-contrast text for accessibility. The Spanish language interface will focus on clear, non-technical terminology (e.g., 'Nueva Receta' instead of 'Create Prescription Record').

navigation.style: Side navigation for desktop (w-64, bg-slate-900 text-slate-300, active items bg-blue-600 text-white) to give a solid anchor, with a top header for mobile and user profile.

components.buttons: Large click targets (h-12). Primary buttons use bg-blue-600 text-white with transition-colors. Include data-testid attributes.
components.inputs: Shadcn standard inputs. h-12 for better ergonomics. Focus state: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600 focus:border-transparent.
components.tables: Clean, flat tables. border-b border-slate-200 on rows. Hover state: hover:bg-slate-50. Left-aligned text.
components.modals: Solid white background, backdrop-blur-sm on the overlay bg-slate-900/40. Max width md.

icons.style: Regular or Duotone for active states

accessibility.contrast: All text meets WCAG AA standards. Focus rings must be visible.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid (e.g., data-testid='login-btn').
accessibility.animations: Minimal. Page transitions and button hovers only.

login_background.description: Blurred hospital room, used for login page split-screen background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all user-facing text is in Spanish.

For the PDF Export functionality (Recetas), create a print-specific CSS class (`@media print`) that hides the navigation and UI buttons, showing only the prescription details with a clean white background and the clinic logo.
Use Phosphor icons for all navigation and action buttons to ensure a polished look.
When creating forms (New Patient, New Prescription), group inputs logically and use large text fields. Avoid complex nested menus.
The Dashboard should display key metrics: Patients Today, Low Stock Inventory, Recent Prescriptions.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms for reliable testing.
